narrative:
Precinct 0020 Franklin (precinct in Shelby County) has 1,183 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.1 percentage points.
